items.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
items.summary: Ali Khamenei's son Mojtaba is conspicuously absent from his father's funeral on Sunday, amid speculation about his condition.

items.title: Giant Gorilla Maze Celebrates Sir David Attenborough’s 100th Birthday
items.summary: One of Britain’s biggest mazes is celebrating Sir David Attenborough’s 100th birthday by creating a spectacular design in the shape of a mountain gorilla. Wistow Maze in Leicestershire, England, came…
